criterion_description: Every candidate strategy is executed across the full registered Phase 13 validation seed plan.
acceptance_threshold: executed_seed_count equals required_full_validation_seeds and no seed is reused for threshold tuning

criterion_description: All predeclared train/test walk-forward windows are executed with leakage checks preserved.
acceptance_threshold: walk_forward_windows_run equals walk_forward_windows_planned and train/test boundaries are unchanged

criterion_description: The predeclared parameter neighborhood is run and summarized without selecting on final-test results.
acceptance_threshold: parameter_sets_run equals parameter_sets_planned and neighborhood performance is not single-point fragile

criterion_description: Candidate strategies remain positive across deployable and stressed execution profiles using acceptance-grade fills and costs.
acceptance_threshold: all deployable/stressed execution profiles pass after broker/cost reconciliation prerequisites are met

criterion_description: Mandatory negative controls degrade or fail under the same full execution harness.
acceptance_threshold: all interpretable mandatory negative controls reject/degrade versus BASE
